# Kami Studios apps

> AI playground experiments and creative work by Kesava. Free, ad-free, no signup. apps.iamkesava.com is the home for kami's playground; tools and toys live on their own subdomains.

## Index

- [Sitemap](https://apps.iamkesava.com/sitemap.xml): every canonical URL on apps.
- [Home](https://apps.iamkesava.com/): playground entry, links out to tools + toys.
- [Tools](https://tools.iamkesava.com/): 60+ free browser tools (separate domain, same builder). Collection pages live there now: https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/<slug>/.
- [Toys](https://toys.iamkesava.com/): creative experiments (audio, visual, generative).

## Agent discovery

- [apps.json](https://apps.iamkesava.com/apps.json): machine-readable catalog of playground entries.
- [Agent permissions](https://apps.iamkesava.com/.well-known/agent-permissions.json): use rights, attribution, license.
- [API catalog](https://apps.iamkesava.com/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727 linkset to discoverable resources.
- [Agent skills](https://apps.iamkesava.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Agent Skills Discovery v0.2 index.

## Playground (real iamkesava routes)

- [Zen Garden](https://apps.iamkesava.com/playground/zen-garden/): Ink and Void: a CSS Zen Garden submission. 1800 lines of pure CSS, scroll-driven animations, oklch color, @property, subgrid. Zero images, zero JS.

## Tool collections (canonical URLs are on tools.iamkesava.com)

- [Developers](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/developers/): Encoding, hashing, formatting, and debugging utilities.
- [Designers](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/designers/): Color, layout, animation, and visual design tools.
- [Writers](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/writers/): Headline testing, readability scoring, and text editing.
- [PMM](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/pmm/): Positioning, competitive analysis, and go-to-market tools.
- [Ads](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/ads/): Campaign tracking, copy testing, and creative utilities.
- [PM](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/pm/): Specs, competitive research, and stakeholder communication.
- [SEO](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/seo/): Meta tags, structured data, and content optimization.
- [Everyone](https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/everyone/): PDF tools, file conversion, and everyday utilities.

## URL templates

- Playground: `https://apps.iamkesava.com/playground/<slug>/`
- Tool collection: `https://tools.iamkesava.com/for/<slug>/` (off-site, redirected from `https://apps.iamkesava.com/for/<slug>`)
